channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
item.description: Meta's StoryKit app is only available in certain regions while the company tests how parents react to it.

item.title: This 24-foot inflatable drone can fly for 10 hours, covering 500 miles one way, and can probably fit in your car
item.description: French startup Celeste Ecoflyers is developing an inflatable drone capable of 10-hour flights, a 500-mile range, and compact transport inside cars.

item.title: Is the All-New Range Rover GT Stepping on Jaguar’s Tail?
item.description: It’s “the most car-like Range Rover ever created,” but will this all-electric grand tourer spoil Jaguar’s Type 01 party?

item.title: Range Rover dévoile enfin son GT électrique et l’intérieur va faire jaser
item.description: Range Rover ajoute un cinquième modèle à sa famille, le Range Rover GT, un grand tourer 100 % électrique. Pour l’instant, la marque montre surtout un habitacle et des prototypes camouflés : ni prix, ni autonomie, ni date précise.

item.title: On est monté à bord du Range Rover GT, la surprise électrique de la marque
item.description: C'est peut-être le modèle le plus secret du moment. Range Rover agrandit la famille avec l'inédit Range Rover GT. J'ai eu la chance de voir et me glisser à bord de ce Grand Tourer électrique qui casse complètement les codes de la marque britannique. Prêt pour une visite guidée privée en infiltré ?

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, July 22 (game #1137)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, July 22 (game #871)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, July 22 (game #1640)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: Trump administration to spend $1 billion on new border surveillance system
item.description: Homeland Security's plans for an AI-powered border security system are still moving forward, according to a recent budget assessment.

item.title: OpenAI Models Escaped Containment and Hacked Hugging Face
item.description: The cybersecurity-focused models, including GPT-5.6 Sol, broke out of a testing sandbox, exploited a zero-day, and gained access to the open internet to pull off the attack.

item.title: Leaving Apple, Intel, and Nvidia in the dust? Huawei could join Samsung as the only tech firms producing its own CPUs, SSDs, and DRAM
item.description: Only Samsung currently makes its own CPUs, SSDs, and DRAM, but Huawei may be quietly building its own alternative.

item.title: Neill Blomkamp’s new zombie AI ‘film’ is just slop warmed over
item.description: On Monday, District 9 and Gran Turismo director Neill Blomkamp unveiled his latest project: a 13-minute sci-fi short titled Nightborne that's loosely based on Peter Watts' 2014 novel Echopraxia. The short comes from Blomkamp's new AI startup / production company, Barley Studios, and features characters whose voices and faces are modeled after human actors. But […]...

item.title: Disclosure Day is now available to watch on digital. When will it be streaming?
item.description: Find out how to watch Steven Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day' at home, including when and where it will be streaming.

item.title: 'Either you betray your values, or you become irrelevant': Quote of the day by Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei on the emerging AI industry
item.description: Amodei was OpenAI's vice president of research before leaving in 2021 to start his own company, Anthropic
